Upcoming events Exploring the environmental impact of medicines: findings from an exploratory project by NICE’s HTA Lab Wednesday 25 February 2026, 11am to 12pm (GMT).
The healthcare system’s environmental impact is an important concern for the NHS, demonstrated by its goal to be carbon ‘net zero’ by 2045. In providing guidance about clinically and cost-effective health technologies, NICE has the potential to support the NHS’s sustainability objectives.
This webinar will discuss the findings and implications of a collaborative project, led by NICE’s HTA Lab, exploring what kinds of environmental impacts pharmaceutical companies are measuring, and how such data could be analysed, presented and critiqued.
NICE Conference 2026 Tuesday 17 March 2026, 9am to 5pm (GMT).
The NICE Conference 2026 delivers an exciting programme exploring the challenges and opportunities facing today’s health and care system. Register your place today to hear the latest on how NICE is helping practitioners and commissioners get the best care to people, fast, while ensuring value for the t
